testing_updates.highlight: Error message checking fix merged for RPC compatibility testing
Testing buildBlockV1 merged; most clients now support it
getStorageValues method added to spec; supported by Nethermind, Reth, Geth

txpool_specification.highlight: TxPool methods under review; TxPoolInspect to be excluded (non-standardizable)
TxPool testing requires framework enhancements for custom validation logic

versioning_and_profiles.highlight: Docs site versioning PR adds dropdown but requires release pipeline work
GitHub action must fetch OpenRPC JSON from releases to build versioned docs
Post-merge-only client support blocked on profiles feature implementation

legacy_compatibility.highlight: Receipt post-state root field remains only protocol-breaking API change mid-chain
Profiles would require separate chain RLP files per profile configuration

action_items.action: Remove TxPoolInspect method from specification PR
Create profiles feature issue and link post-merge support dependency
Invite Ethrex team to future RPC Standards calls

decisions.decision: TxPoolInspect excluded from spec due to non-testable client-specific strings
TxPool tests remain spec-only until custom validation framework implemented
